data.name: {0} bounded changes submitted by {1} on {2}. Review the keys and before/after values before deciding.
data.value: {0} bounded changes submitted by {1} on {2}. Review the keys and before/after values before deciding.

data.name: {0} new and {1} deleted rows are marked in this window. Stage them to create a reviewable change set.
data.value: {0} new and {1} deleted rows are marked in this window. Stage them to create a reviewable change set.

data.name: A credential is stored. Leave both fields blank to keep it, or enter both to rotate it.
data.value: A credential is stored. Leave both fields blank to keep it, or enter both to rotate it.

data.name: A schedule always runs the exact workflow version you published. Editing a draft will not change active runs until you publish again.
data.value: A schedule always runs the exact workflow version you published. Editing a draft will not change active runs until you publish again.

data.name: A stable, non-null unique key is required for bounded paging; this object cannot be published.
data.value: A stable, non-null unique key is required for bounded paging; this object cannot be published.

data.name: A stable, non-null unique key is required.
data.value: A stable, non-null unique key is required.

data.name: Add a database, local file, or FTP source from the left panel.
data.value: Add a database, local file, or FTP source from the left panel.

data.name: Add a rule for failure, success, cancellation, or any supported combination.
data.value: Add a rule for failure, success, cancellation, or any supported combination.

data.name: Add the database or files you want to use.
data.value: Add the database or files you want to use.

data.name: Add the first database, file folder, or FTP location you want to use in a workflow.
data.value: Add the first database, file folder, or FTP location you want to use in a workflow.

data.name: Adjust the filters or return after an audited action has completed.
data.value: Adjust the filters or return after an audited action has completed.

data.name: Administrator-owned relay, sender, TLS, recipient, and message limits.
data.value: Administrator-owned relay, sender, TLS, recipient, and message limits.

data.name: An authenticated actor identity is required.
data.value: An authenticated actor identity is required.

data.name: An error occurred while processing your request.
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Approval and durable application are separate operations. Conflicts do not overwrite newer source data.
data.value: Approval and durable application are separate operations. Conflicts do not overwrite newer source data.

data.name: Approve fixed webhook destinations and executable definitions. Role grants control which workflow authors may select each action.
data.value: Approve fixed webhook destinations and executable definitions. Role grants control which workflow authors may select each action.

data.name: Ask a THub administrator to map your Windows account or AD group to the required application role.
data.value: Ask a THub administrator to map your Windows account or AD group to the required application role.

data.name: Ask an administrator to share a table with your role.
data.value: Ask an administrator to share a table with your role.

data.name: Assign roles, then share one stable editor URL
data.value: Assign roles, then share one stable editor URL

data.name: Assignments match the authenticated Windows user name or Windows/AD group membership.
data.value: Assignments match the authenticated Windows user name or Windows/AD group membership.

data.name: At most 16 server-side filters can be active.
data.value: At most 16 server-side filters can be active.

data.name: Audit records intentionally contain stable identifiers and outcomes only. Configuration, SQL, paths, headers, tokens, row values, and request or response bodies are not stored here.
data.value: Audit records intentionally contain stable identifiers and outcomes only. Configuration, SQL, paths, headers, tokens, row values, and request or response bodies are not stored here.

data.name: Authorize in Swagger or send it as
data.value: Authorize in Swagger or send it as

data.name: Authorizing and loading the governed window…
data.value: Authorizing and loading the governed window…

data.name: Build a repeatable series of steps that moves or changes your data.
data.value: Build a repeatable series of steps that moves or changes your data.

data.name: Build your first automation in four steps
data.value: Build your first automation in four steps

data.name: Call first when generating a client or validating aliases.
data.value: Call first when generating a client or validating aliases.

data.name: Cancellation could not be confirmed. Reload the run before retrying.
data.value: Cancellation could not be confirmed. Reload the run before retrying.

data.name: Checking which tables you can access…
data.value: Checking which tables you can access…

data.name: Choose a workflow to view its alert policy.
data.value: Choose a workflow to view its alert policy.

data.name: Choose the steps and what each one should do.
data.value: Choose the steps and what each one should do.

data.name: Confirm success or see exactly where a run stopped.
data.value: Confirm success or see exactly where a run stopped.

data.name: Connection deleted. Workflows and datasets using it must be reconfigured.
data.value: Connection deleted. Workflows and datasets using it must be reconfigured.

data.name: Copy {0} now — it will not be shown again.
data.value: Copy {0} now — it will not be shown again.

data.name: Copy it once into the consumer's approved secret store.
data.value: Copy it once into the consumer's approved secret store.

data.name: Create a named, expiring token below.
data.value: Create a named, expiring token below.

data.name: Create a resource, discover an approved database object, review its columns and foreign keys, then activate an immutable version.
data.value: Create a resource, discover an approved database object, review its columns and foreign keys, then activate an immutable version.

data.name: Create a workflow, add its steps, check it for problems, then publish when it is ready to run.
data.value: Create a workflow, add its steps, check it for problems, then publish when it is ready to run.

data.name: Create an approved relay profile before adding workflow rules or Email actions.
data.value: Create an approved relay profile before adding workflow rules or Email actions.

data.name: Create CSV, tab text, or Excel
data.value: Create CSV, tab text, or Excel

data.name: Credential encryption is unavailable. Ask an administrator to configure the THub credential master key.
data.value: Credential encryption is unavailable. Ask an administrator to configure the THub credential master key.

data.name: Definitions and credentials are visible only to System Administrators. Passwords are replacement-only and never read back.
data.value: Definitions and credentials are visible only to System Administrators. Passwords are replacement-only and never read back.

data.name: Delete '{0}'? Any workflows or datasets using this connection will stop working and must be reconfigured. Historical run and publication records will be preserved. This cannot be undone.
data.value: Delete '{0}'? Any workflows or datasets using this connection will stop working and must be reconfigured. Historical run and publication records will be preserved. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Delivery rows appear after a terminal workflow rule or Email action queues durable intent.
data.value: Delivery rows appear after a terminal workflow rule or Email action queues durable intent.

data.name: Detected display and search suggestions are not saved. An administrator must approve each lookup and select every exposed column explicitly.
data.value: Detected display and search suggestions are not saved. An administrator must approve each lookup and select every exposed column explicitly.

data.name: Each token rotates independently; plaintext is shown only once and accepted requests are metered.
data.value: Each token rotates independently; plaintext is shown only once and accepted requests are metered.

data.name: Edits are validated and staged against the active immutable schema. They are never written directly from this browser.
data.value: Edits are validated and staged against the active immutable schema. They are never written directly from this browser.

data.name: Email actions queue intent in SQL Server. SMTP delivery is at-least-once, so an ambiguous relay acknowledgement can produce a duplicate.
data.value: Email actions queue intent in SQL Server. SMTP delivery is at-least-once, so an ambiguous relay acknowledgement can produce a duplicate.

data.name: Email alert policy is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: Email alert policy is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: Email deliveries could not be loaded.
data.value: Email deliveries could not be loaded.

data.name: Email delivery profiles could not be loaded.
data.value: Email delivery profiles could not be loaded.

data.name: Email profiles could not be listed.
data.value: Email profiles could not be listed.

data.name: Enter a filter value or select a null operator.
data.value: Enter a filter value or select a null operator.

data.name: Enter both fields to create the encrypted credential.
data.value: Enter both fields to create the encrypted credential.

data.name: Enter both the credential username and password.
data.value: Enter both the credential username and password.

data.name: Enter only an approved secret-provider lookup key; never paste a username or password.
data.value: Enter only an approved secret-provider lookup key; never paste a username or password.

data.name: Expression-only JavaScript. No CLR, filesystem, network, module, or dynamic code access.
data.value: Expression-only JavaScript. No CLR, filesystem, network, module, or dynamic code access.

data.name: For local debugging, set ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT to Development and restart the app.
data.value: For local debugging, set ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT to Development and restart the app.

data.name: Four steps from data to result
data.value: Four steps from data to result

data.name: Generic v1 contract; it does not disclose protected publication columns.
data.value: Generic v1 contract; it does not disclose protected publication columns.

data.name: Go straight to the work you need
data.value: Go straight to the work you need

data.name: Govern approved SMTP relays and durable workflow-event notifications.
data.value: Govern approved SMTP relays and durable workflow-event notifications.

data.name: Grant a capability only on one workflow, publication, or connection identifier.
data.value: Grant a capability only on one workflow, publication, or connection identifier.

data.name: Insert, upsert, or delete approved rows
data.value: Insert, upsert, or delete approved rows

data.name: It can expose sensitive exception information to end users.
data.value: It can expose sensitive exception information to end users.

data.name: Management permission does not imply data access. Every load, lookup, stage, review, and apply is checked server-side.
data.value: Management permission does not imply data access. Every load, lookup, stage, review, and apply is checked server-side.

data.name: Move data between your systems, automate the work, and see what happened.
data.value: Move data between your systems, automate the work, and see what happened.

data.name: No approved values in this bounded result
data.value: No approved values in this bounded result

data.name: No bearer tokens exist for this REST publication.
data.value: No bearer tokens exist for this REST publication.

data.name: No change sets have been staged for this publication.
data.value: No change sets have been staged for this publication.

data.name: No source version exists. Discover an approved database table or view to continue.
data.value: No source version exists. Discover an approved database table or view to continue.

data.name: No step attempts have been recorded.
data.value: No step attempts have been recorded.

data.name: One address per line. The selected profile checks recipient count and approved domains.
data.value: One address per line. The selected profile checks recipient count and approved domains.

data.name: One domain per line. Up to 20 domains; every recipient is checked before SMTP.
data.value: One domain per line. Up to 20 domains; every recipient is checked before SMTP.

data.name: One or more numeric profile bounds are outside the supported range.
data.value: One or more numeric profile bounds are outside the supported range.

data.name: Open a workflow, add an optional schedule in its settings, then publish it.
data.value: Open a workflow, add an optional schedule in its settings, then publish it.

data.name: Open the shared tables you can view or edit.
data.value: Open the shared tables you can view or edit.

data.name: Operational data could not be loaded.
data.value: Operational data could not be loaded.

data.name: Optional reference only. Username/password are resolved by the Worker from the approved secret provider at send time.
data.value: Optional reference only. Username/password are resolved by the Worker from the approved secret provider at send time.

data.name: or a UPN for executable impersonation.
data.value: or a UPN for executable impersonation.

data.name: Plain FTP is unencrypted. The username, password, and file contents are exposed in transit.
data.value: Plain FTP is unencrypted. The username, password, and file contents are exposed in transit.

data.name: Please retry or reload the page.
data.value: Please retry or reload the page.

data.name: Profile name, SMTP host, and sender are required.
data.value: Profile name, SMTP host, and sender are required.

data.name: Provide between 1 and 20 approved recipient domains.
data.value: Provide between 1 and 20 approved recipient domains.

data.name: Publication created. Discover and activate its first source version.
data.value: Publication created. Discover and activate its first source version.

data.name: Publish a workflow, then choose Run now or add a schedule.
data.value: Publish a workflow, then choose Run now or add a schedule.

data.name: Publish when it is ready, then run it now or on a schedule.
data.value: Publish when it is ready, then run it now or on a schedule.

data.name: Published editors could not be loaded.
data.value: Published editors could not be loaded.

data.name: Read an approved table or view
data.value: Read an approved table or view

data.name: Read CSV, tab text, or Excel
data.value: Read CSV, tab text, or Excel

data.name: Repair the JSON object before changing the target mode.
data.value: Repair the JSON object before changing the target mode.

data.name: Repair the JSON object before using a governed selector.
data.value: Repair the JSON object before using a governed selector.

data.name: Required for authenticated webhooks; optional run-as identity for executables.
data.value: Required for authenticated webhooks; optional run-as identity for executables.

data.name: Role data could not be loaded.
data.value: Role data could not be loaded.

data.name: Role grants could not be loaded.
data.value: Role grants could not be loaded.

data.name: Role grants could not be saved.
data.value: Role grants could not be saved.

data.name: Rule name and subject template are required.
data.value: Rule name and subject template are required.

data.name: Rules subscribe to terminal run events and queue through the same durable Email outbox.
data.value: Rules subscribe to terminal run events and queue through the same durable Email outbox.

data.name: Run details could not be loaded.
data.value: Run details could not be loaded.

data.name: Run history could not be loaded.
data.value: Run history could not be loaded.

data.name: Safe outbox state and retry outcomes. Message recipients, subjects, and bodies are intentionally not displayed.
data.value: Safe outbox state and retry outcomes. Message recipients, subjects, and bodies are intentionally not displayed.

data.name: Safely share approved database data as an API or editable table.
data.value: Safely share approved database data as an API or editable table.

data.name: Saved usernames and passwords are encrypted and are never shown again.
data.value: Saved usernames and passwords are encrypted and are never shown again.

data.name: Schema and column policy are rediscovered and reviewed for every version.
data.value: Schema and column policy are rediscovered and reviewed for every version.

data.name: See what ran, whether it worked, and where to look when something needs attention.
data.value: See what ran, whether it worked, and where to look when something needs attention.

data.name: See which workflows run automatically and when each one is due next.
data.value: See which workflows run automatically and when each one is due next.

data.name: Select a data row before toggling deletion.
data.value: Select a data row before toggling deletion.

data.name: Select a separate, write-capable connection to the same database. It is used only by the Worker when approved changes are applied.
data.value: Select a separate, write-capable connection to the same database. It is used only by the Worker when approved changes are applied.

data.name: Select a step to configure its data operation and incoming links.
data.value: Select a step to configure its data operation and incoming links.

data.name: Select a workflow and an Email delivery profile.
data.value: Select a workflow and an Email delivery profile.

data.name: Select a workflow to manage its Email rules.
data.value: Select a workflow to manage its Email rules.

data.name: Select an enabled relational connection first.
data.value: Select an enabled relational connection first.

data.name: Select at least one terminal workflow event.
data.value: Select at least one terminal workflow event.

data.name: Select one approved value before committing the cell.
data.value: Select one approved value before committing the cell.

data.name: Send an email when something happens
data.value: Send an email when something happens

data.name: Settings are validated again at publication and execution boundaries. Connections and database objects must reference approved metadata.
data.value: Settings are validated again at publication and execution boundaries. Connections and database objects must reference approved metadata.

data.name: Showing up to 100 matches. Search narrows larger catalogs without loading unbounded workflow metadata.
data.value: Showing up to 100 matches. Search narrows larger catalogs without loading unbounded workflow metadata.

data.name: Sorry, the content you are looking for does not exist.
data.value: Sorry, the content you are looking for does not exist.

data.name: Source objects could not be discovered.
data.value: Source objects could not be discovered.

data.name: SQL-backed roles, Windows users and groups, global capabilities, and resource-specific grants.
data.value: SQL-backed roles, Windows users and groups, global capabilities, and resource-specific grants.

data.name: Stable identifier used by workflows and connection metadata.
data.value: Stable identifier used by workflows and connection metadata.

data.name: Stage or discard this window's changes before paging.
data.value: Stage or discard this window's changes before paging.

data.name: System Administrator always has every capability and resource. Developer can create, edit, publish, and execute workflows.
data.value: System Administrator always has every capability and resource. Developer can create, edit, publish, and execute workflows.

data.name: System-role permissions are fixed. Principal assignments remain editable.
data.value: System-role permissions are fixed. Principal assignments remain editable.

data.name: Tell THub where it may safely read or write data.
data.value: Tell THub where it may safely read or write data.

data.name: Templates accept only the documented run metadata variables—never source rows or secrets.
data.value: Templates accept only the documented run metadata variables—never source rows or secrets.

data.name: The active schema version is unavailable.
data.value: The active schema version is unavailable.

data.name: The approved lookup context is unavailable.
data.value: The approved lookup context is unavailable.

data.name: The audit event could not be loaded.
data.value: The audit event could not be loaded.

data.name: The change-set details could not be loaded.
data.value: The change-set details could not be loaded.

data.name: The changes could not be staged.
data.value: The changes could not be staged.

data.name: The configured file size is outside the supported range.
data.value: The configured file size is outside the supported range.

data.name: The connection could not be deleted.
data.value: The connection could not be deleted.

data.name: The connection could not be saved.
data.value: The connection could not be saved.

data.name: The connection state could not be changed.
data.value: The connection state could not be changed.

data.name: The connection was changed by another user. Reload before deleting.
data.value: The connection was changed by another user. Reload before deleting.

data.name: The data window could not be loaded.
data.value: The data window could not be loaded.

data.name: The Development environment displays more detailed information about the error.
data.value: The Development environment displays more detailed information about the error.

data.name: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: The Email delivery profile could not be saved because the service is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The Email delivery profile could not be saved because the service is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The Email delivery profile could not be saved.
data.value: The Email delivery profile could not be saved.

data.name: The exact-version retry could not be confirmed. Reload before retrying.
data.value: The exact-version retry could not be confirmed. Reload before retrying.

data.name: The generic Swagger contract documents authentication, filters, sorts, and paging. The token-protected schema endpoint describes this publication's active columns.
data.value: The generic Swagger contract documents authentication, filters, sorts, and paging. The token-protected schema endpoint describes this publication's active columns.

data.name: The governed editor is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The governed editor is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The latest workflow activity you can access
data.value: The latest workflow activity you can access

data.name: The lookup must return exactly one scalar row. Object names are quoted and the filter value is parameterized.
data.value: The lookup must return exactly one scalar row. Object names are quoted and the filter value is parameterized.

data.name: The profile could not be reloaded because the service is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The profile could not be reloaded because the service is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The profile could not be reloaded.
data.value: The profile could not be reloaded.

data.name: The profile state could not be changed because the service is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The profile state could not be changed because the service is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The profile state could not be changed.
data.value: The profile state could not be changed.

data.name: The publication could not be created.
data.value: The publication could not be created.

data.name: The publication could not be loaded.
data.value: The publication could not be loaded.

data.name: The retry could not be queued.
data.value: The retry could not be queued.

data.name: The route follows the active immutable version. Users still need View and any separate edit or approval capabilities below.
data.value: The route follows the active immutable version. Users still need View and any separate edit or approval capabilities below.

data.name: The route kind cannot change after creation.
data.value: The route kind cannot change after creation.

data.name: The rule state could not be changed because the service is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The rule state could not be changed because the service is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The rule state could not be changed.
data.value: The rule state could not be changed.

data.name: The run could not be cancelled.
data.value: The run could not be cancelled.

data.name: The selected database connection is no longer available.
data.value: The selected database connection is no longer available.

data.name: The session has been paused by the server.
data.value: The session has been paused by the server.

data.name: The source schema could not be inspected.
data.value: The source schema could not be inspected.

data.name: The source version could not be created.
data.value: The source version could not be created.

data.name: The token could not be created.
data.value: The token could not be created.

data.name: The trusted action no longer exists.
data.value: The trusted action no longer exists.

data.name: The unused draft was permanently removed.
data.value: The unused draft was permanently removed.

data.name: The version was created but could not be activated.
data.value: The version was created but could not be activated.

data.name: The workflow alert rule could not be reloaded because the service is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The workflow alert rule could not be reloaded because the service is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The workflow alert rule could not be saved because the service is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The workflow alert rule could not be saved because the service is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The workflow alert rule could not be saved.
data.value: The workflow alert rule could not be saved.

data.name: The workflow alert rule no longer exists.
data.value: The workflow alert rule no longer exists.

data.name: The workflow catalog is temporarily unavailable.
data.value: The workflow catalog is temporarily unavailable.

data.name: The workflow could not be archived.
data.value: The workflow could not be archived.

data.name: The workflow could not be deleted.
data.value: The workflow could not be deleted.

data.name: The workflow could not be exported.
data.value: The workflow could not be exported.

data.name: The workflow package could not be imported.
data.value: The workflow package could not be imported.

data.name: This route requires an active spreadsheet-editor publication.
data.value: This route requires an active spreadsheet-editor publication.

data.name: This version will remain read-only until a separate Worker apply connection is selected and writable columns are explicitly enabled.
data.value: This version will remain read-only until a separate Worker apply connection is selected and writable columns are explicitly enabled.

data.name: This window has no changes to stage.
data.value: This window has no changes to stage.

data.name: This workspace is outside your role.
data.value: This workspace is outside your role.

data.name: THub could not load this workflow. Try again or return to the workflow list.
data.value: THub could not load this workflow. Try again or return to the workflow list.

data.name: THub could not load workflows. Try again in a moment.
data.value: THub could not load workflows. Try again in a moment.

data.name: THub guides you from a data source to a result you can check.
data.value: THub guides you from a data source to a result you can check.

data.name: THub is temporarily unavailable. No run was started.
data.value: THub is temporarily unavailable. No run was started.

data.name: Tip: start with a source, add the steps in order, then use Check workflow before publishing.
data.value: Tip: start with a source, add the steps in order, then use Check workflow before publishing.

data.name: Trace persistent management, execution, delivery, and publication activity without exposing payloads or secrets.
data.value: Trace persistent management, execution, delivery, and publication activity without exposing payloads or secrets.

data.name: Trusted actions could not be loaded.
data.value: Trusted actions could not be loaded.

data.name: Use each resource ID when assigning
data.value: Use each resource ID when assigning

data.name: Use the returned opaque cursor for the next deterministic page.
data.value: Use the returned opaque cursor for the next deterministic page.

data.name: Uses a five-part cron schedule. Leave empty to run only when you choose Run now.
data.value: Uses a five-part cron schedule. Leave empty to run only when you choose Run now.

data.name: Versions and run history were preserved.
data.value: Versions and run history were preserved.

data.name: Workflow alert rules are temporarily unavailable.
data.value: Workflow alert rules are temporarily unavailable.

data.name: Workflow alert rules could not be loaded.
data.value: Workflow alert rules could not be loaded.

data.name: Workflow target delete permission is required.
data.value: Workflow target delete permission is required.

data.name: Workflow target upsert permission is required.
data.value: Workflow target upsert permission is required.

data.name: You do not have permission to edit this workflow.
data.value: You do not have permission to edit this workflow.

data.name: You do not have permission to manage this connection.
data.value: You do not have permission to manage this connection.

data.name: You do not have permission to save this connection.
data.value: You do not have permission to save this connection.

data.name: Your roles do not grant access to this publication.
data.value: Your roles do not grant access to this publication.

data.name: Add a database, local file, or FTP source.
data.value: Add a database, local file, or FTP source.

data.name: Saved edits wait for review before they are applied.
data.value: Saved edits wait for review before they are applied.

data.name: Save to validate these edits and send them for review.
data.value: Save to validate these edits and send them for review.

data.name: Pick a table, review its visible columns, then publish.
data.value: Pick a table, review its visible columns, then publish.

data.name: Choose what users see. Safe defaults are selected from the inspected schema.
data.value: Choose what users see. Safe defaults are selected from the inspected schema.

data.name: The schema will be validated before this version becomes active.
data.value: The schema will be validated before this version becomes active.

data.name: Add an approved Worker folder before choosing a CSV target file.
data.value: Add an approved Worker folder before choosing a CSV target file.

data.name: The file must stay inside the selected connection's approved folder.
data.value: The file must stay inside the selected connection's approved folder.

data.name: Append writes headers only when the file is new or empty.
data.value: Append writes headers only when the file is new or empty.

data.name: Date/time variables accept .NET date formats. Variable values cannot contain path separators.
data.value: Date/time variables accept .NET date formats. Variable values cannot contain path separators.

data.name: Target file is outside the approved folder
data.value: Target file is outside the approved folder

data.name: Repair the JSON object before changing CSV settings.
data.value: Repair the JSON object before changing CSV settings.

data.name: Select an approved CSV connection first
data.value: Select an approved CSV connection first

data.name: The connection determines which Worker folder may receive the file.
data.value: The connection determines which Worker folder may receive the file.

data.name: Add an approved Worker folder before choosing a local target file.
data.value: Add an approved Worker folder before choosing a local target file.

data.name: Add an approved FTP or FTPS connection before choosing a remote target file.
data.value: Add an approved FTP or FTPS connection before choosing a remote target file.

data.name: Use an absolute remote path. THub will not create missing remote folders.
data.value: Use an absolute remote path. THub will not create missing remote folders.

data.name: Variables are allowed only in the final remote file name.
data.value: Variables are allowed only in the final remote file name.

data.name: Repair the JSON object before changing file settings.
data.value: Repair the JSON object before changing file settings.

data.name: Select an approved file connection first
data.value: Select an approved file connection first
